scopeNote: Packet-codec + socket-wiring change. No DDD domain (model.go) or sub-domain (resource.go action-event) packages introduced; most DOM-* items are N/A by construction.

checks.name: Table-driven tests
checks.evidence: 50/50 clientbound + 15/15 serverbound have sibling _test.go with version-table RoundTrip + packet-audit:verify markers

checks.name: No atlas-constants duplication
checks.evidence: no new shared-type decl; raw uint32/byte at wire boundary (whisper.go:56,140) per existing field-codec convention; ClockType/KiteDestroyAnimationType pre-existing/out-of-scope

checks.name: DDD domain items
checks.evidence: N/A — no domain/REST surface in codec package

checks.name: Logic not in handler

whisper pure move
checks.evidence: R097 — x/y widened int16->int32, WriteShort->WriteInt (whisper.go:142-190); mislabeled as move-not-rewrite. Test+evidence backed (whisper_test.go:87-133), non-blocking

checks.name: no dead code after move

checks.name: regression test for new RoutedNames branch
checks.evidence: no *_test.go added/changed; grade_test.go/matrix_test.go do not populate Inputs.RoutedNames. Known gap, non-blocking

nonBlocking: FINDING-1: libs/atlas-packet/field/clientbound/whisper.go:142-190 — whisper relocation is R097 not a pure move; WhisperFindResultMap x/y widened int16->int32. Test+evidence backed but should be documented as a wire-format change, not 'move-not-rewrite'.
FINDING-2: tools/packet-audit/internal/matrix/build.go:80-100 — new op-identity RoutedNames guard has no regression test; add a grade_test.go case populating RoutedNames with a colliding opcode.
informational: INFO-1: new codecs use raw uint32/byte for mapId/channelId at the wire boundary (whisper.go:56,140) rather than _map.Id/channel.Id; not a DOM-21 violation — matches existing field-codec convention, no shared type redeclared.
